notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Bryan Hudson picks off James Wood at 1st on throw to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Nasim Nuñez picked off and caught stealing home, catcher Edgar Quero to third baseman Miguel Vargas to catcher Edgar Quero to third baseman Miguel Vargas. Luis García Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Riley Cornelio. Sam Antonacci scores. Luisangel Acuña to 3rd. Throwing error by pitcher Riley Cornelio.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Riley Cornelio. Sam Antonacci scores. Luisangel Acuña to 3rd. Throwing error by pitcher Riley Cornelio.

notableEvents.label: José Tena pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Tena grounds out, shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Joey Wiemer to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nasim Nuñez singles on a line drive to center fielder Luisangel Acuña. Jorbit Vivas to 3rd. Nasim Nuñez to 2nd. Jorbit Vivas advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Luisangel Acuña.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi flies out to right fielder James Wood.

notableEvents.label: Colson Montgomery GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery grounds into a double play, first baseman Luis García Jr. to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr. Miguel Vargas out at 2nd. Colson Montgomery out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi doubles (4) on a fly ball to left fielder Daylen Lile.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Riley Cornelio. Sam Antonacci scores. Luisangel Acuña to 3rd. Throwing error by pitcher Riley Cornelio.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi out on a sacrifice fly to center fielder Jacob Young. Luisangel Acuña scores. Tristan Peters to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nasim Nuñez singles on a line drive to center fielder Luisangel Acuña. Jorbit Vivas to 3rd. Nasim Nuñez to 2nd. Jorbit Vivas advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Luisangel Acuña.
